REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (780 Guerrero Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for petitioner Donald R. Krohn.

Cause came on for sale of real property located at 790 Guerrero Street, San Francisco. The opening bid is in the amount of $6,200,000.00. There are no other bids. Mr. Der stated he will need to submit a revised order, as the purchaser will now be 780 Guerrero, San Francisco, CA LLC only for the full 100% interest in the property. The sale was confirmed at $6,200,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 17, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property subject to receipt and review of the order. No additional bond is required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
